text:
Market today: The chip news is the driver. SK Hynix's "enormous" demand comment is the real spark for our sector. The rest is noise.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate at -23.96% given its leveraged nature and current price action. SPAL is also at -23.98% and needs attention. PTNM is a tiny spec at -15.25% and might be worth trimming to manage risk.

Watch: Keep an eye on AVGO and TSLA from the scanner list if they pull back to their entry levels.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged semiconductor positions and watch for any follow-through on the chip demand news.
plays: Trim SOXL: Given the -23.96% loss and its leveraged nature, consider reducing exposure.
Trim SPAL: Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF is down -23.98%; consider trimming.
Consider trimming PTNM: Down -15.25%, this small spec may be worth reducing to manage risk.
